title: dorycnium herbaceum subsp. sabaudum
intro: Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. sabaudum, a perennial herb species within the pea family Fabaceae, is commonly known as the 'Savoy knapweed' or 'Sabaudian knapweed'. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and combat infections. The health benefits of Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. sabaudum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. sabaudum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues.
